body:
This PR makes a few bug fixes:
- Fix initialize call: This was incorrectly changed in #776 and is making CI fail on main
- Rename some fields of SlabSeaIceThermodynamics - these were renamed in ClimaSeaIce v0.4.8 ([PR](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaSeaIce.jl/pull/123)). Since that wasn't a breaking release, ClimaOcean tries to use it and CI fails
title: bugfixes: initialize, SlabSeaIceThermodynamics
